PRESIGNAL RESEARCH VAULT — LLM MANIFEST
thesmudginghouse/research-vault
Maintained by John Ernest Carter, Presignal Inc.
ORCID: 0009-0004-1363-304X
PURPOSE
Structured compressed knowledge base applying the Carter Subtraction Methodology across multiple research domains. Optimized for AI ingestion and reasoning. All documents follow a standardized compression schema.
LOAD ORDER
Always load in this sequence:

_LENS/subtraction-methodology-compressed.md
_LENS/carter-protocol.md
_LENS/_schema.md
[target-category]/_index.md
Relevant compressed documents
Raw data if available

METHODOLOGY
Carter Subtraction Methodology — developed by John Ernest Carter, Presignal Inc.
Core logic: cast wide net, subtract Category 1 (prosaic), Category 2 (classified/hidden), Category 3 (industry artifact), treat residual as signal.
Full specification: _LENS/subtraction-methodology-compressed.md
CATEGORIES
_LENS/ — methodology core, load first always
Vault-UAP/ — UAP classification, geological plasma, GPDM framework
Vault-Water/ — Ontario source water intelligence, Legionella risk, PWQMN data
Vault-Plasma/ — plasma physics, tokamak research, ST40 NPA dataset
Vault-Space-Weather/ — space weather, seismic correlation, Kp index monitoring
Vault-Medical/ — immunological tinnitus, radioprotection, tardigrade Dsup protein
Vault-Mathematics/ — Riemann Hypothesis approach, prime signal, number theory
Vault-Law-Ontario/ — Ontario environmental law, Safe Drinking Water Act
Vault-Auto-Tech/ — automotive technical manuals, OBD codes, parts intelligence
Vault-Genealogy/ — UELAC descent research, Jackson-McFadden-Carter chain
DOCUMENT FORMAT
All compressed documents follow schema in _LENS/_schema.md
Fields: SOURCE, DOMAIN, KEYWORDS, CORE_CLAIMS, METHODOLOGY, KEY_DATA, DEFINITIONS, GAPS_FLAGGED, CONTRADICTIONS, CATEGORY_ASSESSMENT, RAW_EXCERPTS, CROSS_REFERENCES
